key.name: streamers
key.description: A comma separated list of account names to follow. Prefix with kick: for Kick streamers.

key.name: opencmd
key.description: The command executed when clicking on a Twitch streamer (use %streamer% for the login name).

key.name: kick-opencmd
key.description: The command executed when clicking on a Kick streamer (use %streamer% for the login name).

key.name: interval
key.summary: The interval between updates in minutes
key.description: The interval between updates in minutes

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: Show a notification when a streamer comes online

key.name: notifications-game-change
key.description: Show a notification when a streamer changes games

key.name: hideplaylists
key.description: Hide active streams that are playlist streams (reruns)

key.name: hideempty
key.summary: Hide indicator if noone is streaming

key.name: sortkey
key.summary: Sort key for streams in menu

key.name: showuptime
key.description: Show how long the stream has been live
